name: sweep
description: Detects unnecessary files, unused code, orphaned files, and proposes safe deletion. For repo cleanup, dead code removal, or tidying.

capabilities.summary: Detect unused functions, classes, variables via static analysis
Find orphaned files via AST and graph-based analysis
Identify unused package dependencies with lockfile awareness
Generate safe deletion plans with confidence and rollback
Find unused configuration entries and stale env vars
DCE-LLM pattern for sophisticated dead code
Detect flag-controlled dead code via Piranha and ld-find-code-refs
